summary: PART I Overview We are a dermatologist-founded, late clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, or the Company, we, us, or our, focused on developing innovative therapeutics to address pervasive treatment challenges in highly prevalent aesthetic and dermatological conditions. Our initial focus is developing better treatments for PHL, a condition affecting approximately 50 million men and 30 million women in the United States.
